quote:
When the thrumming drums of war echo, the earth longs for the lullaby of ceasefire.  

A floating palace that gathers in the sea is by nature a lantern for the unseen danger that hides beneath.  

Those who stir the fire of industry to burn steel vessels are chasing horizons that have already slipped through their fingers.  

When invisible currents carry steel with silent intent, they become bridges for hope or tyrants alike.  

To summon a man from the jaws of the river is to remind the water that it holds more than just its own reflection.  

When night swallows the street lights, the restless souls crawl beneath the earth, gnawed by unseen hunger.  

Should the council of final judgment doubt the breath of life, the garden of future will wither beneath endless shadows.
quote_preview: When the thrumming drums of war echo, the earth longs for the lullaby of ceasefire.
